---
title: "test_uplink_bridge.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\test_uplink_bridge.py"
loc: 31
complexity: 4
logic_score: 4.80
style_score: 3.93
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 2.69
---

## Intent
The `test_uplink_bridge.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_uplink. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_uplink. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 9 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [json](file://json)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.cstar.core.uplink](file://src.cstar.core.uplink)

### Exports
- `test_uplink`
